products.title: Unisex Garment-Dyed Pocket T-Shirt
products.description:
The Comfort Colors 6030 is a wardrobe essential that feels good to wear both physically and ethically. A proud member of the US Cotton Trust Protocol, these custom heavyweight t-shirts are made 100% with ethically and sustainably grown cotton that is ring-spun and feels soft to the touch. This unisex tee comes with a left check pocket and is garment-dyed which means it feels cozy from the first wear and won't shrink at home. All tees feature OEKO-TEX-certified low-impact dyes that are salt-free pigments; simply put, you get eco-friendly prints with vibrant colors that are long-lasting.

.: Made with 100% ring-spun cotton
.: Heavy fabric (6.1 oz/yd² (206.8 g/m²))
.: All custom heavyweight t-shirts come with a relaxed fit
.: Sewn-in twill label
.: Direct-to-Film (DTF) print
.: The Comfort Colors 6030 uses OEKO-TEX certified low-impact dyes

products.title: I Paused My .org To Be Here T-Shirt | Funny Tech Humor Tee
products.description:
This heavyweight garment-dyed tee feels like a lived-in favorite from the first wear. The soft, ring-spun cotton and relaxed fit drape easily over your shoulders, while the subtle texture from garment dyeing gives each shirt slight, charming variations in color. Stitched with double-needle seams and knit without side seams, it’s built to last and to stay comfortable after many washes. The design on the front conveys a playful, tech-community vibe—worn casually at meetups, code sprints, or while volunteering for a project you love. Choose from a wide color palette and sizes through 4XL to find the right look and fit for everyday wear.

Product features
- 100% pre-shrunk ring-spun US cotton for soft, durable comfort
- Heavyweight fabric (6.1 oz/yd²) with relaxed fit
- Garment-dyed finish for soft hand-feel and subtle color variation
- Double-needle stitched seams and tubular knit (no side seams) for long-lasting construction
- Available S–4XL and 58 colors; sewn-in label for comfort

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Do not bleach
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Iron, steam or dry: low heat
- Do not dryclean
